title: Gin Symptom Chooser
subtitle: Pick the first condition that matches what your API is doing under review, load, or incident pressure.

panels.heading: Request flow feels magical or fragile
bullets: routing flow is hard to reason about

panels.heading: Middleware order changes behavior
bullets: auth chain is hard to debug

panels.heading: Binding or validation keeps surprising you
bullets: multipart and upload paths are brittle
request contracts fail at the edge

panels.heading: Production behavior breaks after the basics work

footer: The first matching symptom is usually the right entry point. Avoid scanning the whole framework lane when the pressure is already localized.
